Bash(python3 -c "
from db import check_connection, run_sql

# Test connection
print\('DB connected:', check_connection\(\)\)

# Test basic query
rows = run_sql\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM reservations_hackathon'\)
print\('Reservations row count:', rows[0]['cnt']\)

# Test tools
from tools import handle_tool
import json

# Test get_otb_summary
result = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_otb_summary', {'months_ahead': 3}\)\)
print\('OTB months:', len\(result.get\('by_month', []\)\)\)

# Test get_room_type_analysis
result = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_room_type_analysis', {}\)\)
print\('Room types:', len\(result.get\('by_room_type', []\)\)\)

# Test get_company_analysis
result = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_company_analysis', {}\)\)
print\('Companies:', len\(result.get\('companies', []\)\)\)

# Test get_concentration_risk
result = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_concentration_risk', {}\)\)
print\('Concentration risk:', result\)

# Test SQL guard
result = json.loads\(handle_tool\('run_sql', {'query': 'DROP TABLE reservations_hackathon'}\)\)
print\('SQL guard \(DROP\):', result\)

result = json.loads\(handle_tool\('run_sql', {'query': 'SELECT 1 AS test'}\)\)
print\('SQL guard \(SELECT\):', result\)

print\('\\\\nAll tool handlers working!'\)
")

Bash(sleep 3 && cd /Users/andriybabiy/hackathons/giveago/hiring_hackathon/backend && python3 -c "
from db import check_connection, run_sql
import json

# Test connection
print\('DB connected:', check_connection\(\)\)

# Test row count
rows = run_sql\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM reservations_hackathon'\)
print\('Reservations:', rows[0]['cnt']\)

# Test all tool handlers
from tools import handle_tool

r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_otb_summary', {'months_ahead': 3}\)\)
print\('OTB months:', len\(r.get\('by_month', []\)\), '| totals:', bool\(r.get\('totals'\)\)\)

r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_pickup', {'days': 7}\)\)
print\('Pickup summary:', bool\(r.get\('summary'\)\), '| segments:', len\(r.get\('by_segment', []\)\)\)

r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_cancellations', {'days': 30}\)\)
print\('Cancellations:', r.get\('summary'\)\)

r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_segment_mix', {}\)\)
print\('Segments:', len\(r.get\('by_segment', []\)\), '| channels:', len\(r.get\('by_channel', []\)\)\)

r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_room_type_analysis', {}\)\)
print\('Room types:', [rt['display_name'] for rt in r.get\('by_room_type', []\)]\)

r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_company_analysis', {}\)\)
print\('Companies:', [c['company_name'] for c in r.get\('companies', []\)]\)

r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('get_concentration_risk', {}\)\)
print\('Concentration:', r\)

# Test SQL guard
r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('run_sql', {'query': 'DROP TABLE reservations_hackathon'}\)\)
print\('SQL guard \(DROP\):', r.get\('error'\)\)

r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('run_sql', {'query': 'DELETE FROM reservations_hackathon'}\)\)
print\('SQL guard \(DELETE\):', r.get\('error'\)\)

r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('run_sql', {'query': 'SELECT 1 AS ok'}\)\)
print\('SQL guard \(SELECT\):', r\)

# Test remember_preference
r = json.loads\(handle_tool\('remember_preference', {'type': 'threshold', 'key': 'ota_target', 'value': '25%'}\)\)
print\('Remember pref:', r\)

print\('\\\\nAll tools working!'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
from agent import _load_skills, SKILL_CONTEXT
skills = _load_skills\(\)
# Count skills
count = skills.count\('# '\)  
print\(f'Skills loaded: {count} sections'\)
print\(f'Total skill context length: {len\(skills\)} chars'\)
# Check all 3 skills present
for name in ['Revenue Analysis', 'Morning Briefing', 'Concentration Risk']:
    present = name in skills
    print\(f'  {name}: {\\"FOUND\\" if present else \\"MISSING\\"}'  \)
")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add backend phase 2: new tools, connection pooling, skill routing, SSE streaming

- Add connection pooling \(ThreadedConnectionPool\) to db.py for concurrent request handling
- Add 3 new tools: get_room_type_analysis, get_company_analysis, get_concentration_risk
- Add SQL validation guard to run_sql tool \(SELECT-only enforcement\)
- Add lightweight skill routing in agent.py \(morning_briefing vs revenue_analysis\)
- Add OpenAI client caching to avoid re-creating per request
- Add SSE streaming endpoint \(POST /chat/stream\) with word-by-word delivery
- Add session logging to /briefing and /chat endpoints
- Add sse-starlette dependency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
